description_long: This house is a single-story residential building surrounded by a wooden fence, featuring a mix of flat and sloped terracotta-tiled roofs. The structure is primarily composed of light-colored walls with large windows, and includes a prominent glass-covered section that appears to be a sunroom or enclosed patio. A blue-tinted glass pyramid structure, likely a skylight or small greenhouse, is attached to one side of the house. The front of the house is defined by a covered porch area with a sloped roof and visible support beams. The property is enclosed by a tall, alternating brown and white wooden fence, providing privacy and a clear boundary. The overall design blends modern and Mediterranean influences, with open outdoor spaces and a focus on natural light.
description: A modern single-story house with flat and terracotta-tiled roofs, large windows, a glass pyramid skylight, and a tall wooden privacy fence.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat roof, large window, and the wooden fence enclosing the property.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch with a sloped terracotta roof and the main entryway behind the wooden fence.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the glass pyramid skylight and a secondary flat-roofed section.
description_view_3: Back view featuring the glass pyramid structure, multiple windows, and the continuous wooden fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with sloped terracotta roof, wooden support beams, and a main door behind a tall wooden fence
